name: Occupancy Critical — Capacity Exceeded
description: Every 30 seconds, check AOA occupancy. When 30 or more people are detected, send a Slack alert to the store manager and activate the door indicator light via I/O output for 35 seconds.

actions.message:
:red_circle: *CRITICAL — STORE CAPACITY EXCEEDED*

Occupancy: {{aoa_human}} people (limit: 30)
Camera: {{camera.model}} ({{camera.serial}})
Time: {{date}} {{time}}

Door indicator activated. Please manage entry.
